title: Build a pub/sub fan-out layer
description: Route channel events to subscribers across instances with per-connection isolation and bounded delivery.
body: Steps: 1. Model channels/topics and a subscription registry. 2. For multi-instance scale, publish events to a shared broker (Redis pub/sub, NATS) so any instance reaches its local subscribers. 3. On receipt, enqueue to each local connection's bounded queue (non-blocking fan-out). 4. Apply the backpressure policy per connection. 5. Clean up subscriptions on disconnect. Rollback point: single-instance in-process fan-out. Validation: a test across two instances delivers an event to subscribers on both, one slow client does not stall others, and disconnect removes the subscription.
